message:
🐛 Fix console-docs.kubestellar.io redirect via middleware (#932)

Next.js i18n middleware intercepts the root path `/` and redirects
to `/en` before Netlify's netlify.toml redirect rules can fire.
This caused console-docs.kubestellar.io to land on
kubestellar.io/docs/console/en (404) instead of /docs/console/readme.

Add hostname check in middleware.ts (same pattern as docs.kubestellar.io)
to redirect before i18n processing:
- Root: console-docs.kubestellar.io → kubestellar.io/docs/console/readme
- Deep links: console-docs.kubestellar.io/X → kubestellar.io/docs/console/X

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
